creator: tech-lists@zyxst.net
text:
hm. I didn't add no_ccache_depend. 

If you look carefully at the logfile, you'll see it's not getting 
NO_CCACHE_DEPEND from the jail's make.conf. Because the last 
few lines of desktop-make.conf (which are commented out) pertain to lang/gcc48

Also, a batch run uses ccache fine. The only port failing in this way, out of 
over 1400 installed ports, is rawtherapee.

Here's make.conf for that poudriere jail, in its entirety:

[snip]

% less /usr/local/etc/poudriere.d/desktop-make.conf
WITH_MANCOMPRESS=YES
OPTIONS_UNSET+=DEBUG
OPTIONS_SET+=OPTIMIZED_CFLAGS
LICENSES_ACCEPTED+=GPLv2+ MSPAT DCC
CPUTYPE?=haswell
TARGET_CPU_ARCH=haswell

.if (!empty(.CURDIR:M/usr/ports/math/openblas) || !empty(.CURDIR:M/var/ports/usr/ports/math/openblas) )
math_openblas_SET=AVX AVX2
math_openblas_UNSET=DYNAMIC_ARCH
MAXTHREADS=16
TARGET_CPU_ARCH=HASWELL  # haswell cpu
.endif

#.if (!empty(.CURDIR:M/usr/ports/lang/gcc48) || !empty(.CURDIR:M/var/ports/usr/ports/lang/gcc48) )
#MAXTHREADS=16
#CPUTYPE=
#TARGET_CPU_ARCH=
#.endif

/usr/local/etc/poudriere.d/desktop-make.conf (END) <=== that's where desktop-make.conf ends.

[/snip]

Here's the system /etc/make.conf, in its entirety, in case it's required:

[snip]

% less /etc/make.conf
MAKE_JOBS_NUMBER=8
WITH_CCACHE_BUILD=YES
CCACHE_DIR=/var/cache/ccache
WITH_MANCOMPRESS=YES
OPTIONS_UNSET+=DEBUG
OPTIONS_SET+=OPTIMIZED_CFLAGS
#OPTIONS_SET+=NCURSES
DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=ImageMagick=7
LICENSES_ACCEPTED+=GPLv2+ MSPAT PDFlib
CPUTYPE?=haswell
TARGET_CPU_ARCH=haswell

.if (!empty(.CURDIR:M/usr/ports/math/openblas) || !empty(.CURDIR:M/var/ports/usr/ports/math/openblas) )
math_openblas_SET=AVX AVX2
math_openblas_UNSET=DYNAMIC_ARCH
MAXTHREADS=16
TARGET_CPU_ARCH=HASWELL
.endif
[/snip]

Here is /usr/local/etc/poudriere.conf in its entirety:

ZPOOL=poudriere
ZROOTFS=/poudriere
FREEBSD_HOST=https://download.freebsd.org
RESOLV_CONF=/etc/resolv.conf
BASEFS=/poudriere
POUDRIERE_DATA=${BASEFS}/data
USE_PORTLINT=yes
USE_TMPFS="wrkdir data localbase"
MAX_FILES=4096
DISTFILES_CACHE=/usr/ports/distfiles
SVN_HOST=svn.FreeBSD.org
GIT_BASEURL=git.freebsd.org/src.git
CHECK_CHANGED_OPTIONS=verbose
CHECK_CHANGED_DEPS=yes
PKG_REPO_SIGNING_KEY=/usr/local/etc/ssl/keys/repo.key
CCACHE_DIR=/var/cache/ccache
CCACHE_STATIC_PREFIX=/usr/local
SAVE_WRKDIR=no
WRKDIR_ARCHIVE_FORMAT=txz
ALLOW_MAKE_JOBS=yes
TIMESTAMP_LOGS=yes
URL_BASE=http://desktop/poudriere
ATOMIC_PACKAGE_REPOSITORY=yes
COMMIT_PACKAGES_ON_FAILURE=yes
KEEP_OLD_PACKAGES=yes
KEEP_OLD_PACKAGES_COUNT=5
PORTTESTING_FATAL=yes
BUILDER_HOSTNAME=desktop
PRESERVE_TIMESTAMP=yes
PRIORITY_BOOST="rust* qt5-*"
DURATION_FORMAT="%H:%M:%S"
USE_COLORS=yes
TRIM_ORPHANED_BUILD_DEPS=yes
LOCAL_MTREE_EXCLUDES="/usr/obj /var/tmp/ccache"
HTML_TYPE="hosted"
HTML_TRACK_REMAINING=yes
